name: Isophotal Galaxy Morphology Measurement
description:
Open the Ultraviolet Imaging Telescope (UIT) galaxy sample FITS file located at `~/AstroImages/raw/uit_galaxy_sample.fits`. Your task is to measure the morphological parameters of the galaxy at a 3-sigma isophotal threshold ($T = Mean + 3 \times StdDev$). Determine the sky background mean and standard deviation using a 50x50 pixel rectangular ROI in the top-left corner of the image (starting at approximately X=10, Y=10). Perform an elliptical fit to the thresholded galaxy region and save the resulting measurement table to `~/AstroImages/measurements/galaxy_morphology.csv`. 

Write a summary report to `~/AstroImages/measurements/morphology_report.txt` using exactly this format:

BACKGROUND_MEAN: <value>
BACKGROUND_STDDEV: <value>
ISOPHOTAL_THRESHOLD: <value>
MAJOR_AXIS: <value>
MINOR_AXIS: <value>
ELLIPTICITY: <value>

(Note: Ellipticity = 1 - (MINOR_AXIS / MAJOR_AXIS))
